creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As David Muir Sharnoff wrote:

> 	In any case, the clri documentation references:
> 
> 		fsdb(8) icheck(8) ncheck(8)
> 
> 	none of which exist.

fsdb(8) exists now.

icheck(8) used to exist, but has apparently vanished at the transition
to 4.4BSD-Lite.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
